message:
fix: eleven correctness fixes from audit sweep (batches 496-503)

Bug fixes identified during the security/correctness audit:

1. process.rs — Zombie leak: if set_nonblocking fails on any stdio
   handle (stdin/stdout/stderr), the child process was left running.
   Fix: add inspect_err to kill the child before propagating the error.

2. obligation/recovery.rs — Conflict/linearity ordering: a
   Committed⊔Aborted conflict entry was silently force-aborted by
   the linearity lane when auto_resolve_conflicts was disabled.
   Fix: track unresolved conflicts in a BTreeSet and skip them in
   the linearity pass.  Test tightened to assert exact single action.

3. trace/file.rs — Oversized event guard missing in compressed paths:
   extracts validate_event_len() helper and applies it to two
   previously unguarded buffered/compressed code paths in TraceReader
   and TraceEventIterator.  Two new regression tests.

4. database/pool.rs — Dead loop: while-let that could only execute
   once changed to if-let.  Double-lock in closed-pool cleanup fixed
   by decrementing total under the same lock guard.

5. supervision.rs — Backoff ordering: record_restart() was called
   after next_delay() and recent_restart_count(), so exponential
   backoff used stale attempt count.  Reordered to record first.

6. messaging/service.rs — Morphism destination: subject-only
   transfers were allowed when the morphism destination was a broad
   pattern.  Adds TransferRequiresExactMorphismDestination error and
   ensure_exact_morphism_target() check with regression test.

7. config.rs — Input validation: adds ConfigError variants for
   non-finite/non-positive backoff multiplier and initial > max delay.

8. obligation/graded.rs — Close state: self.closed was set
   unconditionally, so a failed close (outstanding obligations)
   would not trigger the Drop leak panic.  Fix: only set on success.

9. cancel/progress_certificate.rs — NaN propagation: guards two
   floating-point paths with is_finite() checks on denominator and
   explicit NaN handling on variance (max(0.0) propagates NaN).

10. service/load_balance.rs — Bounds check: state vector resize now
    happens before total_weight summation, preventing OOB index when
    weights vector is shorter than backend list.

11. database/sqlite.rs — Style: converts if-let/else-panic to
    idiomatic let-else for clarity (no behavioral change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
